mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, phone, real_name, role, status, sync_enabled, avatar, last_login_time, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, ding_union_id, ding_user_id, job_number, title, corp_id, login_source
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE ding_union_id = #{unionId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE ding_user_id = #{dingUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM users WHERE username = #{username} ORDER BY deleted_at IS NULL DESC, id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE users SET deleted_at = NULL, status = #{status}, ding_union_id = #{dingUnionId}, ding_user_id = #{dingUserId}, real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar = #{avatar}, title = #{title}, job_number = #{jobNumber}, sync_enabled = #{syncEnabled}, login_source = #{loginSource} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM roles r INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
